message:
fix(traceback): preserve source indentation and stop filtering "main" as internal frame

- Remove "main" from internal frame filter list so it appears in tracebacks
  rather than being silently omitted
- Preserve original source code indentation in traceback context display
  instead of trimming leading whitespace with trim_start()
- Update snapshot test to reflect both changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
